_comment_crosshost: Single host: leave the keys below as-is. Cross-host (one realm across machines, §7): set bind to 0.0.0.0 and profile.discovery to tailscale — then this whole file can be Dropbox-shared verbatim across machines, because advertiseHost auto-derives from `tailscale status` per machine. Set advertiseHost only to override the auto-derived address. Same token on every machine = same realm. (Windows firewall must allow inbound TCP on the control port over the Tailscale interface.)
_comment_persistence: DESIGN SPEC — not yet enforced by the bridge (§13, pending implementation). Durable messages (park/retain) + durable responsibilities. `dir` is the shared folder (Dropbox here, or an SMB/NFS path) and may differ from where this config lives. Timers shown with defaults so they're visible/tunable; messageTtlDays can be overridden per message. mailboxMaxCount + mailboxMaxSize are PER MAILBOX (per recipient) — over cap, drop oldest and log. mailboxMaxSize is a size string: plain bytes or KB/MB/GB, space optional, decimals OK ('16MB', '12.5 MB', '1 GB', '1048576'). devReadableKeys uses human-readable mailbox/claim folder names (slug + 4-char hash) instead of sha256 — DEV ONLY, default false; keys are format-prefixed (r-/h-) and lookups check both forms, so flipping it never strands existing mailboxes.
